description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rough, weathered surface and a predominantly light beige to off-white coloration. The rock displays natural textural variations, including small pits, crevices, and subtle color mottling, suggesting exposure to the elements. Its form is asymmetrical, with one side appearing slightly flatter and broader, while the opposite side is more rounded and bulbous. The surface is matte and non-reflective, with visible grain and occasional darker mineral inclusions. There are no visible markings, carvings, or artificial modifications on the rock. Its overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A rough, light beige rock with an irregular, weathered surface and natural textural variations. Its asymmetrical shape and matte finish make it suitable as an urban obstacle or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's most rounded and bulbous side, highlighting its rough, uneven surface and subtle color variations.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a flatter, broader face with visible pitting and a few darker mineral spots.
description_view_2: The rock appears more squat and wide from this perspective, with the base showing a slightly concave area and more pronounced surface texture.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the elongated, oval aspect of the rock, with a mix of smooth and rough patches and some darker streaks near the bottom.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
